overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a player walking through a futuristic urban environment engulfed in a severe orange sandstorm. The player traverses elevated walkways, descends through concrete structures, passes through a dark parking underpass, and emerges onto a dusty street lined with modernist buildings and palm trees.

events.description: player approaches and passes by outdoor seating area with NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered elevated walkway, glancing at seating areas on the left

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor table facing the walkway
standing near chainlink fence looking out at the storm

entered.detail: metal mesh security fence running along the right side of the walkway
elevated highway or walkway structure visible through the haze
tables and chairs arranged along the left wall of the walkway
palm trees visible through the fence, swaying in the storm wind

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered elevated walkway during a severe sandstorm. To the right, a chainlink fence reveals palm trees swaying in the orange haze. On the left, NPCs sit at outdoor tables. The atmosphere is warm and ominous with diffused storm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp between concrete support structures

events.description: player turns left and begins descending ramps to lower ground level

agents.ego_description: navigating down concrete ramps and stairs, moving between large support pillars

entered.detail: descending concrete walkway with metal railings
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the elevated walkway via concrete ramps, passing between massive support pillars. The chainlink fence and seating area disappear from view as the camera moves downward, with palm trees now visible in the center distance through the orange haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage or transit underpass with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering dark underpass with artificial fluorescent lighting, bright exit visible ahead
approaching bright exit of underpass, silhouettes of people visible against the light

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit parking structure toward the bright exit, passing parked cars

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera as a silhouette against the bright exit light

entered.detail: covered parking structure with concrete ceiling and parked vehicles
overhead artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the dark space
vendor truck with illuminated signage parked on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark parking garage or underpass, transitioning from natural storm light to artificial fluorescent lighting. Parked cars line the sides, and a food truck sits on the left. Silhouetted figures walk toward the camera as the player approaches a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk along brutalist concrete buildings during sandstorm

events.description: exiting underpass into bright orange storm light, visibility improves slightly

agents.ego_description: walking along street-level sidewalk past concrete buildings and palm trees in the heavy sandstorm

entered.detail: tall modern street lighting poles along the sidewalk edge
large brutalist concrete building facade with minimal windows
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street level
palm trees lining the street, heavily obscured by blowing sand

segments.scene_description: The player exits the underpass into the open street, where the full force of the orange sandstorm is visible. Walking along a sidewalk bordered by a guard rail on the left and a massive concrete building on the right, street lamps and palm trees emerge from the haze as the player continues through the desolate urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered elevated walkway down into the heart of a severe, orange-hued sandstorm. It begins along a covered path where NPCs sit at outdoor tables and a chainlink fence reveals palm trees swaying in the ominous, diffused light. As the camera moves forward, the walkway transitions into a series of descending concrete ramps, causing the seating area and fencing to fall away. The scene then shifts downward between massive support pillars, narrowing the perspective before opening up to reveal the distant palm trees centered within the thick haze.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the artificial dimness of a subterranean passage into the blinding haze of a futuristic sandstorm. It begins by entering a dark parking underpass, where the natural light is replaced by flickering fluorescent tubes that illuminate parked cars, a food truck, and silhouetted figures. As the camera advances toward a bright opening at the far end, the interior shadows give way to a sudden burst of orange light. The scene then expands into an open street, where the camera moves along a sidewalk bordered by a guard rail and a massive concrete building. Finally, the environment becomes fully engulfed in the thick orange dust, with street lamps and palm trees gradually emerging from the desolate haze.
